channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Boards must avoid sleepwalking into the AI era. KPMG's global AI risk chief offers a survival guide
item.description: Corporate governance was designed for a predictable world, but AI is probabilistic, fast, and already embedded in core processes.

item.title: Arianna Huffington swears by one boundary to disconnect from work every night, and Ralph Lauren's CHRO agrees it is the best habit
item.description: Huffington Post founder Arianna Huffington says balance does not exist, but she never skips one phone habit before bed.

item.title: Record revenues, record profits, record revenue per employee. The Fortune 500 is richer than ever and employing fewer people
item.description: Corporate America's hiring slowdown, explained through charts and data.

item.title: Meet the 11 Black Fortune 500 CEOs leading firms with over $432 billion in combined revenue
item.description: Black CEOs make up only 2% of top U.S. corporate leaders.
